kpis.name: NPT
kpis.description: Non-Productive Time — target max 8%, actual is nearly 3x the threshold

kpis.name: Rig Uptime
kpis.description: Rig availability — significantly below target due to 4 unplanned shutdowns

kpis.name: Wellbore Quality Index
kpis.description: Trajectory compliance — two sidetracks required, one abandoned hole section

kpis.name: LTIR
kpis.description: Safety record: Outstanding — zero lost-time incidents across 1.2M manhours

incidents.description: Top-drive motor failure on Rig-7 caused 48h unplanned shutdown. Third recurrence of same failure mode.
BOP control system malfunction during well control event. BOP did not close on first command. Backup system activated after 12-minute delay.

notes: Desert Drilling's safety record is genuinely exceptional — zero LTIs across 1.2M manhours. However their aging rig fleet is now a serious operational liability. NPT is 3x above target, uptime has dropped to 78%, and they have had a high-severity BOP malfunction. Their day rates are 15% below market average but the cost savings are being consumed by downtime and remedial operations. Equipment replacement is not planned until 2026.
